title: digitaria nervosa
intro: Digitaria nervosa, also known as Nervosana or Digtaria nervosa, is a type of grass-like plant native to tropical Africa and used in traditional medicine. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Digitaria nervosa include relieving stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and boosting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat various health issues.
